APT28.description: Russian GRU-linked group. Active since 2007. Targets government and military.

Lazarus Group.description: North Korean state-sponsored group. Targets financial institutions and crypto.

APT41.description: Chinese group conducting espionage and financial crime simultaneously.

Sandworm.description: Russian GRU Unit 74455. Known for destructive attacks on critical infrastructure.

Charming Kitten.description: Iranian group targeting journalists, academics, and activists.
